notes: This pack publishes governed screening parameters for the Tier 1 near-field/far-field inhalation model.
The airflow and particle mappings remain deterministic screening heuristics and are not a calibrated aerosol transport model.
Product-family profiles are recommendation packs for common spray contexts and are not substitutes for scenario-specific evidence.
Product-family profile provenance is split between household-cleaner, personal-care, disinfectant, and pest-control screening packs so downstream review can keep those recommendations distinct.
Subtype-specific profiles are optional overlays. They only activate when the caller or evidence reconciliation supplies a product_subtype.

sources.title: Direct-Use Exposure MCP Tier 1 NF/FF screening parameter pack
Direct-Use Exposure MCP Tier 1 NF/FF household-cleaner screening profile pack
Direct-Use Exposure MCP Tier 1 NF/FF personal-care screening profile pack
Direct-Use Exposure MCP Tier 1 NF/FF disinfectant screening profile pack
Direct-Use Exposure MCP Tier 1 NF/FF pest-control screening profile pack

directionality_profiles.note: Low local exchange class for weak directional forcing around the breathing zone.
Moderate local exchange class for lateral air movement that dilutes but does not collapse the near-field zone.
Conservative low-exchange class when the source plume is oriented toward the user.
High local exchange class when air movement pulls the plume away from the breathing zone.
Intermediate class for room-driven mixing without a strong directional draft.

particle_profiles.note: Fine aerosol screening class that preserves a stronger near-field increment.
Coarse spray screening class with faster local loss than the mixed baseline.

profiles.label: Household cleaner trigger spray Tier 1 profile
profiles.note: Benchmark Tier 1 profile for household cleaner trigger sprays in consumer room contexts.

profiles.label: Household cleaner pump spray Tier 1 profile
profiles.note: Benchmark Tier 1 profile for manual pump sprays where local room mixing dominates over a strong draft.

profiles.label: Personal care aerosol spray Tier 1 profile
profiles.note: Benchmark Tier 1 profile for directed personal-care aerosols with finer particle persistence near the user.

profiles.label: Personal care pump spray Tier 1 profile
profiles.note: Benchmark Tier 1 profile for hand-actuated personal-care pump sprays used close to the face or upper torso.

profiles.label: Disinfectant surface trigger spray Tier 1 profile
profiles.note: Subtype-aware Tier 1 profile for short surface trigger-spray disinfectant tasks, aligned to the ConsExpo personal-volume treatment.

profiles.label: Pest-control indoor surface trigger spray Tier 1 profile
profiles.note: Subtype-aware Tier 1 profile for indoor surface insecticide sprays, using a longer active-spray anchor than household-cleaner trigger sprays.

profiles.label: Pest-control targeted spot trigger spray Tier 1 profile
profiles.note: Subtype-aware Tier 1 profile for targeted spot insecticide sprays, preserving the longer active-spray duration used in the ConsExpo targeted-spot scenario family.

profiles.label: Pest-control crack and crevice trigger spray Tier 1 profile
profiles.note: Subtype-aware Tier 1 profile for crack-and-crevice insecticide sprays, aligned to the shorter crevice-treatment duration in the ConsExpo scenario family.

profiles.label: Pest-control air-space aerosol Tier 1 profile
profiles.note: Subtype-aware Tier 1 profile for air-space insecticide aerosols, using a whole-room aerosol screening anchor rather than a short coarse-spray surface-treatment profile.
